/usr/bin/llvm-ar qc libconlog_core.a CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/EventBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/ParserRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/ProcessGuard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/FileWatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/LineBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/Dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/KillDeathParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/DamageParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/NoscopeParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/StickyNadesParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/SuicideParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/PlayerConnectedParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/ChatParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conlog_core.dir/App.cpp.o
/usr/bin/llvm-ranlib libconlog_core.a
